scripts.build: npm run build -w @gear-solver/core && npm run build -w @gear-solver/web
scripts.desktop:dev: concurrently -k -n vite,electron -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev -w @gear-solver/web" "wait-on http-get://localhost:5173 && npm run dev -w @gear-solver/desktop"
scripts.desktop:build: npm run build -w @gear-solver/web && npm run build -w @gear-solver/desktop
